get.summary: Persons with significant control Notification List
get.description: List of all notifications of a specific person with significant control

parameters.name: psc_id
parameters.description: The person with significant control id of the notification list being requested

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description: Use “active” to return only active notifications.

parameters.name: items_per_page
parameters.description: The number of notifications to return per page.

parameters.name: start_index
parameters.description: The first row of data to retrieve, starting at 0. Use this parameter as a pagination mechanism along with the items_per_page parameter.

200.description: List the person with significant control notifications

active_count.description: The number of active persons with significant control notifications in this result set.

ceased_count.description: The number of ceased persons with significant control notifications in this result set.

date_of_birth.description: The date of birth of the person with significant control.

month.description: The month of date of birth.

year.description: The year of date of birth.

inactive_count.description: The number of inactive persons with significant control notifications in this result set.

items.description: The list of person with significant control notifications.

address.description: The service address of the person with significant control. If given, this address will be shown on the public record instead of the residential address.

address_line_1.description: The first line of the address.

address_line_2.description: The second line of the address.

postal_code.description: The postal code. For example CF14 3UZ.

notified_to.description: The company information of the notification.

company_name.description: The name of the company the person with significant control is notified to.

company_number.description: The number of the company the person with significant control is notified to.

company_status.description: The status of the company the person with significant control is notified to.

ceased_on.description: The date that Companies House was notified about the cessation of this person with significant control.

country_of_residence.description: The country of residence of the person with significant control.

identification.description: Information related to the registration of either a `corporate-entity-person-with-significant-control` or a `corporate-entity-beneficial-owner`.

country_registered.description: The country or state the corporate entity with significant control is registered in.

legal_authority.description: The legal authority supervising the corporate entity or legal person with significant control.

legal_form.description: The legal form of the corporate entity or legal person with significant control as defined by its country of registration.

place_registered.description: The place the corporate entity with significant control is registered.

registration_number.description: The registration number of the corporate entity with significant control.

identity_verification_details.description: Information relating to the identity verification of the person with significant control.

anti_money_laundering_supervisory_bodies.description: The Anti-Money Laundering supervisory bodies that the authorised corporate service provider was registered with when verifying the person with significant control

appointment_verification_end_on.description: The date on which the identity verification statement was removed for the notification.

appointment_verification_start_on.description: The date on which the identity verification statement was supplied for the notification.

appointment_verification_statement_date.description: The date from which an identity verification statement can be supplied for the notification.

appointment_verification_statement_due_o.description: The date by which an identity verification statement must be supplied for the notification.

authorised_corporate_service_provider_na.description: The name of the authorised corporate service provider that verified the identity of the person with significant control.

identity_verified_on.description: The date on which the authorised corporate service provider verified the identity of the person with significant control.

preferred_name.description: The name provided to the authorised corporate service provider by which the person with significant control prefers to be known.

is_sanctioned.description: Flag indicating if the beneficial owner was declared as being sanctioned on the latest filing of the overseas entity.

links.description: Links to other resources associated with this person with significant control notification resource.

company.description: Link to the company profile resource that this notification is associated with.

name.description: Name of the person with significant control.

name_elements.description: A document encapsulating the separate elements of a person with significant control's name.

forename.description: The forename of the person with significant control.

middle_name.description: The middle name of the person with significant control.

surname.description: The surname of the person with significant control.

title.description: Title of the person with significant control.

nationality.description: The nationality of the person with significant control.

natures_of_control.description: Indicates the nature of control the person with significant control holds. For enumeration descriptions see `description` [section in the enumeration mappings file](https://github.com/companieshouse/api-enumerations/blob/master/psc_descriptions.yml).

notified_on.description: The date that Companies House was notified about this person with significant control.

principal_office_address.description: The principal/registered office address of a corporate-entity-beneficial-owner or legal-person-beneficial-owner of a registered-overseas-entity.

address_line_1.description: The first line of the address.

address_line_2.description: The second line of the address.

country.description: The country. For example, United Kingdom.

postal_code.description: The postal code. For example CF14 3UZ.

items_per_page.description: The number of persons with significant control notifications to return per page.

links.description: Links to other resources associated with this person with significant control notification resource.

self.description: Link to this person with significant control notification resource.

name.description: The person with significant control name.

start_index.description: The first row of data to retrieve, starting at 0. Use this parameter as a pagination mechanism along with the items_per_page parameter.

total_results.description: The total number of persons with significant control notifications in this result set.
